summary: Validated the force-error suggestAxes path, sidebar navigation reachability, library-import dedup behavior, and context-sensitive suggestion differences across two live draft packs.

assertions.reason: The sidebar navigation reached Axis Library, Transcripts, and Persona Packs, and pack detail pages exposed extraction entry points from Persona Packs.
Using the forceSuggestAxesError route parameter produced the friendly retryable error message and re-enabled the Suggest axes button without any page-level exceptions.
After importing existing_support_style from the Axis Library, the next generation run did not re-suggest that already-selected key.
The two different pack contexts produced meaningfully different suggestions with overlap 0/5 (none).

frictions: Suggestion content varies across runs, so the context-sensitivity check compared key overlap instead of expecting specific labels.
